name: Sausage-Filled Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9 pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. Set aside.
4. Cook pasta in the pot without adding salt until cooked through.
5. Drain and drain well.
6. To prepare filling, cook sausage over medium heat until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
7. Drain sausage on paper towels.
8. In a large bowl, combine ricotta, sausage, 1/2 cup mozzarella, Parmesan, egg, parsley, and pepper.
9. Mix well.
10. Spoon the filling evenly into cooked manicotti.
11. Place stuffed manicotti in a single layer in the prepared pan.
12. Spoon tomato sauce evenly over manicotti.
13. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella.
14. Bake until heated through and cheese melts, about 35 minutes.
15. Serve immediately.
